name: Robby Ameen
abstract: Robby Ameen (born December 7, 1960) is an American drummer, composer, bandleader, and educator who resides in New York City. Although he is of Lebanese Druze origin, Ameen is best known for the unique and powerful Afro-Cuban style he has created.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Ruben Blades y Seis del Solar

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Valentin
about_quotes.evidence: Oh I’d say just being with this band for such a long time. Bill O’Connell, Robby Ameen, Lincoln Goines and Milton Cardona.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Valentin interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 15, 2000
